nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 菲律宾
nodes.summary: 菲律宾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联131种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、青头潜鸭、菲律宾冢雉等131种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 卡尔·林奈
nodes.summary: 卡尔·林奈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联115种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、角叫鴨、白臉樹鴨等115种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 黄腹花蜜鸟
nodes.summary: 黄腹花蜜鸟（Garden sunbird，学名 Cinnyris jugularis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于卡尔·林奈、菲律宾、巴拉望島，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 巴拉望島
nodes.summary: 巴拉望島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括巴拉旺孔雀雉、Fire-throated flowerpecker、黄腹花蜜鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The garden sunbird (Cinnyris jugularis), previously known as the olive-backed sunbird, is a species of passerine bird in the family Nectariniidae that is found in the Philippines except on the Palawan island group

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The garden sunbird (Cinnyris jugularis), previously known as the olive-backed sunbird, is a species of passerine bird in the family Nectariniidae that is found in the Philippines except on the Palawan island group

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The garden sunbird (Cinnyris jugularis), previously known as the olive-backed sunbird, is a species of passerine bird in the family Nectariniidae that is found in the Philippines except on the Palawan island group

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits forests, shrublands, grasslands and artificial habitats. The garden sunbird has adapted well to human environments and is common in fairly densely populated areas, where it builds nests in human settlements
